rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §26.0083, which governs parental notification regarding student health and well-being services. The provisions address unrelated subjects.
quote: Sec. 26.0083. RIGHT TO INFORMATION REGARDING MENTAL, EMOTIONAL, AND PHYSICAL HEALTH AND HEALTH-RELATED SERVICES.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses school district parental notification requirements unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
